title: LeadResponse
description: Typed AAP response for `lead.general` and `lead.vehicle`. Use AppointmentLeadResponse for `lead.appointment`. Carried inside an A2A `Message.parts[].data` DataPart returned from the `SendMessage` operation.

lead_id.description: Stable identifier assigned by the dealer for this lead.

status.description: Lead disposition. 'duplicate' means an equivalent lead already exists for this customer/vehicle. 'rejected' means the lead was not accepted (e.g. consent missing, channel not allowed); details in 'message' or returned via Error.

dealer.description: Convenience contact summary the buyer agent can show the user.

message.description: Optional contextual note from the dealer (e.g. 'A sales rep will email Anna within 1 business day.').
